prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 76 名持续上升至 2026 年第 69 名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力获认可；2022 年该校曾因教师学术不端事件出现偏负面声誉信号，近年无明显重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 75 位（样本 14 条视频），评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光度中等；作物学 A-、植物保护 A-、畜牧学 A-、草学 A-，共 4 个 A- 学科，农林特色鲜明；与招生专业中的农学类、植物保护、动物科学等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，利好该校计算机类、电气工程等热门专业；山西省 2026 年物理类考生 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 5928 人（-3.42%），考生总数下降缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势、2026 年扩招 11 人（加剧竞争）、软科排名持续上升（吸引高分考生）、本省物理类考生减少约 3.42%（缓解竞争）等多重因素，扩招和排名上升的竞争加剧效应略强于考生减少的缓解效应，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 15846 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 16412 名，区间 15912–16912 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science in Shanxi was approximately 12804→13243→12487→11144→15846, showing an overall fluctuating increase (ranking number increases). In 2024, it significantly moved forward to 11144, but in 2025, it greatly moved backward to 15846, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3359 places over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 15846. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category/Science in Shanxi from 2021 to 2025 was 181→186→187→189→195 students, with a slight annual expansion. The 2026 plan is 206 students, an increase of 11 students (+5.64%) compared to 2025, with a larger expansion rate than previous years, which may intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, indicating a steady improvement in the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, the university experienced a negative reputation signal due to a teacher's academic misconduct incident, but there have been no major negative public opinions in recent years. Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranking is 75th (sample of 14 videos), rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms. It has 4 A- disciplines: Crop Science A-, Plant Protection A-, Animal Science A-, and Grassland Science A-, with distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics. These directly correspond to majors such as Agronomy, Plant Protection, and Animal Science, attracting some interest in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, benefiting the university's popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi is 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.42%) from 173,347 in 2025, which alleviates competition due to the overall decline in examinee numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 11 students (intensifying competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (attracting high-scoring students), and the decrease in local Physics Category examinees by about 3.42% (alleviating competition), the competition intensification effect from expansion and ranking rise slightly outweighs the alleviation effect from the decrease in examinees. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 15,846. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16,412, with a range of 15,912–16,912.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15,912–16,912, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15,500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 16,800), it is recommended to secure a spot with Tier 3 advantageous discipline majors while leveraging the university's 985 platform advantages.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1840→1845→1861→2089→2238, showing a gradual backward trend year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 377 places in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 2238; the enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province for liberal arts/history category from 2021 to 2025 was 17→16→15→16→18 respectively, with small fluctuations; the 2026 plan is 16 students, a decrease of 2 students (-11.11%) compared to 2025, with a significant reduction in enrollment, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, showing a continuous improvement; no major negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 75th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Crop Science A-, Plant Protection A-, Animal Science A-, Grass Science A-, all are agriculture and forestry disciplines, with no direct disciplinary evaluation correspondence to history category enrollment majors (Law, Sociology, Public Administration, English, Russian, International Chinese Education).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Law major is 'recommended' (relatively hot), and the Chinese Language/Chinese major is 'recommended' (relatively hot), which positively drives applications for history-related majors; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) compared to 84,879 in 2025, with a notable drop in total examinees, greatly alleviating competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the reduction of 2 students in 2026 (intensifying competition), and the significant decrease of about 25.6% in local history category examinees (significantly alleviating competition), the alleviating effect of the decrease in examinees is much stronger than the intensifying effect of enrollment reduction. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 2238; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2074, with a range of 1574–2574.
